/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/srv/detail/set_velocity__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/srv/detail/get_velocity__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/srv/detail/emergency_stop__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/msg/detail/cmd_throttle_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/msg/detail/kinematic_debug_msg__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
